examples.title: Testing Spring Strength
examples.content: Question: Do stiffer springs bounce higher? Design: Use springs of different stiffness (k=100, 200, 300 N/m), drop from same height, measure bounce height. Change: spring stiffness. Keep same: drop height, ball mass, surface. Trials: 3 per spring.

examples.title: Pendulum Period Test
examples.content: Question: Does pendulum length affect swing time? Design: Use lengths 10, 20, 30, 40 cm, measure 10 swings for each. Change: length. Keep same: bob mass, starting angle, location. Trials: 3 per length.

examples.title: Friction vs Surface
examples.content: Question: Does surface roughness affect friction? Design: Slide block on wood, plastic, cloth at different angles, measure when it starts to slide. Change: surface type. Keep same: block mass, starting position, angle increment. Trials: 3 per surface.
